name: songR
description: R package for SONG dimensionality reduction — structured, interpretable embeddings for high-dimensional biological data

name: bambamR
description: R package for streamlined RNA-seq analysis pipelines — from count matrices to publication-ready results

name: hexmakR
description: R package for generating polished hex sticker logos for R packages using customizable templates

name: reflowR
description: Custom workflowr themes and templates for reproducible research websites in R

name: molpathR
description: Unified R platform for molecular pathology data — parse NGS files (VCF, BAM, FASTQ), XML/PDF reports, and clinical data into a queryable database with an interactive Shiny app for clinical exploration and visualization.

name: qviewparsR
description: Pure-R parser for the binary .Q-View project file format used in chemiluminescent multiplex ELISA plate imaging and quantification.
